summary: Reviewed the inbox runner and paired delegate together as an end-to-end readonly smoke path. The pair is generally well-structured and evidence-oriented, but the wrapper's delegate resolution logic is incorrect for its default path and would fail to locate the supplied delegate at runtime in the reviewed repository layout. Verdict: needs_revision.
notes: Review was grounded in supplied artifact snapshots for both scripts.
Evaluation covered wrapper and delegate together per review scope.
Review artifact includes explicit verdict and rationale.
